name: GigaChat
note: Sberbank's Russian ChatGPT rival, launched in closed testing April 24 2023, built on the NeONKA neural-network ensemble; params were never disclosed for the original model. 128K ctx reflects the current GigaChat-2 API (the original 2023 model is deprecated/redirected).
verificationNotes: Existence and April 24, 2023 launch date independently reconfirmed via TechStartups, The National, Cyprus Mail and other outlets (all dated 2023-04-24) — original given date was correct. NeONKA architecture name and description ('Neural Omnimodal Network with Knowledge-Awareness', ensemble of models incl. Kandinsky 2.1 for images) independently confirmed via multiple secondary sources — not a hallucination. Could NOT confirm openness/license claim from the cited Wikipedia article itself (it says nothing about licensing); however other sources confirm the original 2023 GigaChat chatbot/API product is closed/proprietary (note: Sber has since open-sourced separate newer 'GigaChat3' MoE checkpoints under MIT in 2025, but that is a distinct later release not covered by this record's release date). 128K context window reconfirmed as current spec for GigaChat-2/2-Pro/2-Max via CloudPrice API listings; original 2023-era first-gen models are now deprecated and redirect to GigaChat-2. No results/benchmark rows were present to verify. Params/activeParams correctly left null as undisclosed for this specific (original, non-MoE) product.
